description:
About the job
Senior Full-Stack TypeScript Engineer (Frontend-Focused) 
Sydney based- Hybrid role
$170-190k base 
PR OR Citizens ONLY !!

🚀 Senior Full Stack Developer –Are you someone who wants to make a Real Impact? 

We’re searching for a Senior Full Stack Developer who’s eager to take the lead on mission‑critical projects, drive innovation, and make a tangible impact within a collaborative, fast‑moving team.
This is your chance to take ownership, enjoy real autonomy, and work alongside passionate engineers in a well‑established startup environment where big ideas come to life.


🌟 What You’ll Bring
Expertise in TypeScript
Strong experience with React.js / Next.js
Solid understanding of Frontend Architecture, Component Design, and Material UI
Hands-on with Frontend E2E Testing Frameworks (Playwright, Cypress)
Proficiency in Backend Web Technologies:
Node.js
GraphQL & REST APIs
Database ORM (SequelizeJS or similar)
Microservices Architecture
Experience with Git, CI/CD, and Cloud Platforms (AWS, GCP, Vercel)


What You’ll Do
Lead the design, development, and delivery of major product features.
Define technical direction and architecture for complex projects.
Drive front-end excellence with React/Next.js and a strong focus on UI/UX.
Improve and maintain APIs, core services, and third-party integrations.
Collaborate with distributed teams across Australia and the Philippines.
Mentor engineers, champion best practices, and guide technical decisions.
Explore AI-driven product enhancements and new technologies.

What You Bring
5+ years of front-end experience (ReactJS) with full-stack capability.
Deep TypeScript expertise and strong front-end architecture skills.
Experience leading projects and mentoring developers.
Proficiency in Node.js, GraphQL/REST APIs, and microservices.
Familiar with CI/CD pipelines and cloud deployment (AWS, GCP, Vercel).
Strong ownership mindset and ability to deliver high-quality solutions.

Bonus Skills
Serverless framework and Docker experience.
Playwright/Cypress for E2E testing.
Database ORM knowledge (e.g., SequelizeJS).

Why You’ll Love working with this business.
Fast-growing PropTech scale-up with great investor backing.
Central Sydney location - 4 days in office, 1 WFH.
Supportive, collaborative, and growth-focused culture.
Smart teammates, espresso machine, ping pong, and weekly fresh fruit.

If you believe you’re a great fit for this role, please submit your CV and we’ll be in contact

```
